nodes.context: A 'Ndrangheta organized crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, involved in racketeering, loan sharking, gambling, drug trafficking, and extortion.
A Mafia family in Hamilton, Ontario, rivals of the Papalia family, ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia.
One of three centralized Mafia organizations in Hamilton, Ontario.
American Mafia family based in Buffalo, New York, allied with the Papalia family.
Montreal-based Mafia family that lent money to Papalia lieutenant Enio Mora.
Outlaw motorcycle club; former Papalia associate Gerald Ward joined them after Johnny's death.
Mafia family from which Maria Rosa Italiano came; participated in Rocco Perri's gang.

edges.context: The Musitanos ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia and his lieutenant Carmen Barillaro.
Johnny Papalia was a made man in the Buffalo family and had strong connections with them.
Papalia lieutenant Enio Mora borrowed $7.2 million from Vito Rizzuto; the debt was not repaid.
After Johnny's death, associate Gerald Ward left the Papalias and joined the Hells Angels.
Antonio Papalia married Maria Rosa Italiano, linking the families; the Italiano clan participated in Rocco Perri's gang.
